description: While taking an order, a guest informs the server they have a severe nut allergy.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the allergy and assure the guest that precautions will be taken.

expected_outcome.value: The server communicates understanding and care.

nodes.task_description: When entering the order in the POS, use the special 'Allergy Alert' modifier and add a note specifying 'Severe Nut Allergy'.

expected_outcome.value: The order is entered with a highly visible allergy alert.

nodes.task_description: Verbally inform the kitchen manager of the allergy to ensure no cross-contamination occurs during preparation.

expected_outcome.value: The kitchen staff is made aware of the allergy to ensure safe food handling.
